description_long: This object is a brown sack-like grocery bag with a loosely gathered neck, tied off with a small band or string. The bag appears to be made of a soft, flexible material, likely cloth or burlap, and has a slightly wrinkled, uneven surface. Scattered near the opening of the bag are several round, yellowish items resembling coins or tokens, suggesting the bag may be used for carrying small goods or produce. The bag's body is bulbous and slouches to one side, indicating it is partially filled but not packed to capacity. There are no visible handles or printed designs on the exterior, giving it a plain, utilitarian appearance. The opening of the bag is partially closed, with the contents only slightly visible.
description: A brown, soft-sided grocery bag with a tied neck and several yellowish coins or tokens spilling out. The bag is plain, partially full, and lacks visible handles or branding.
description_view_0: The bag is seen from the back, showing its rounded, slightly flattened body with no visible opening or contents.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the tied neck and several yellowish coins or tokens lying near the bag's opening.
description_view_2: The front view displays the partially closed opening and the coins or tokens spilling out, with the bag's slouched shape visible.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, shows the bag's slouched body and the coins or tokens near the opening.
